iteration_131_actions.description: Swarm iteration 131 - Confirmed ollama-proxy iter 130 fix worked (main now green). Fixed second lint issue: removed deprecated gosimple linter. Merged redhat-ai-workflow PR #177 (mcp bump).
actions_taken: ✅ Scanned all 193 repos for CI status
✅ Confirmed ollama-proxy main branch CI now PASSING after iteration 130 formatter fix
✅ Fixed ollama-proxy .golangci.yml: removed deprecated 'gosimple' linter (merged into staticcheck in golangci-lint v2.12.2)
✅ Pushed fix commit 5d92068 to ollama-proxy main
✅ Triggered @dependabot rebase on ollama-proxy PR #4 to pick up gosimple fix
✅ Merged redhat-ai-workflow PR #177 (Bump mcp 1.25.0 → 1.28.1) - all checks passing
✅ Verified all 15 open issues have AI responses and labels (0 untriaged, 0 unlabeled)
⏳ ollama-proxy PR #4 rebasing to pick up gosimple fix
⚠️  dmzoneill/dmzoneill PR #3 still open - non-bot PR, needs owner review (Update Profile check failing)

fixes_applied.description: Removed deprecated gosimple linter from .golangci.yml (merged into staticcheck in golangci-lint v2.12.2)
fixes_applied.root_cause: golangci-lint v2.12.2 removed gosimple as a standalone linter - it is now part of staticcheck
